title: Fugazi
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Fugazi''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] the frigate ''Fugazi'' helped with the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuation]] of [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]], carrying [[Brigia Rebel base|base]] supplies and escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] just before the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
